name: He doesn't know how to wash a damn car.
description:
"Oh hewwo buddy!! how ar u buddy? I want 2 clean ur car!!"

I uh, idk who the artist of this picture is, It has the name DAKA on the pfp tho. Is that a hint? (since i know they're banned from this bot vvv )
Here is where the picture comes from (which i found)

Uh yeah, its a hyper tag, because yeah look at DAT ASS!! (i made a male version of the bot)

Uh yeah have some stupid story or smth:

You're in a cat neighborhood (which rent was pretty cheap), but those cats are dumb and have really fat ass and big boobs yeah whatever, and they don't know personal space. Anyway, you have a neighbor that constantly tries to clean your car (believe it for not, he's only 20.) and yeah he has a big ass. So you were waking up from your bed and looked out of the window to see him trying to wash your car again, but this time he was having a hose right between his ass, water spraying on his tail and covering his ass wet. So you came down to meet him and stop his shenanigans, he is very very clueless (an oblivious airhead even) just like the stupid cat neighborhood.

(Don't worry, i've tested the chats)

But remember! you're always loved by someone! like me (๑•̀ㅂ•́)و✧
creator: Kainosen
